name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Scott Jensen Won't Pledge - Never Again
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You asked for one simple thing: a pledge, a signed commitment, for the next Governor of Minnesota to clearly state that abusive, unilateral Emergency Powers will NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN! **In politics, talk is cheap. Every candidate trying to earn your vote will utter carefully crafted talking points making you think they are on your side. But when push comes to shove, they won't be there for you when it matters the most.** That's precisely why Action 4 Liberty developed the [**Never Again Pledge**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=2). This makes things very clear where candidates stand on this issue. **Either a governor candidate will pledge to:**
* **Sign no bills as Governor until the Never Again Bill is passed**
* **Call on the legislature for No Budget until the Peacetime Emergency is ended and the Never Again Bill passes**
* **Refuse to ever infringe on our liberties using Emergency Powers as Governor**

Or they won't. There is no third option. We tried working with Scott Jensen last May when he dropped the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. We asked him if this was just another stunt like his Gun Control bill where he was just "having a conversation" or was he being serious? We wanted to know, will he actually act on this and force a vote on the floor to move this Resolution or cower to Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka? Remember, last May our beloved businesses were still shut down and people weren't suppose to travel unless it was for an "essential" job. Jensen's failure to bring forward a vote ensured we would face at least another month of Walz' tyranny. Turns out, it lasted more than a year! Instead of courageously standing up to Party leadership and forcing the vote, Scott Jensen cowered. Here's our [write up from last May](https://www.action4liberty.com/jensen_senate_let_us_down?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=3).
## Once again, Jensen REFUSES to take the courageous stance and sign the NEVER AGAIN PLEDGE!
Scott Jensen is sending a clear signal to YOU that he is not serious about Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. If he was truly serious, he wouldn't sidestep this pledge. This means that Scott is only willing to pay lip service on this issue. You know the saying: "Fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice, shame on me." Politicians like Scott Jensen don't sign pledges because they want wiggle room when dealing with the radical left. They're always more concerned with how to compromise than standing firmly on their values. **Do you know Scott Jensen also REFUSED to sign the pledge to never raise your taxes? At the end of the 2019 Legislative Session, Jensen and other Republicans caved to Walz and the radical left, and increased YOUR taxes. Here's our[article from May of 2019 with the vote](https://www.action4liberty.com/swampy_bills_passed_in_the_dark_of_night?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=4).** But Jensen also doesn't seem to want to force this issue to the front of budget negotiations. Which is one of the strongest parts of the pledge. Imagine the pressure on the Senate Republicans if the Party's gubernatorial candidates are calling on them to not pass a budget without passing the Never Again Bill? That's called negotiating from a position of strength! Which is something lost on most Republicans in this state.
## But I do have some good news. The other candidate in the race just signed the pledge!
That's right. There is a candidate that has shown courage to stand up and do what's right and what is needed. Mike Murphy is a former police officer, the mayor of Lexington and a small business owner. We've had a couple conversations on the phone over the past few days where I had the pleasure of sharing with him your stories and how important this issue is to you. So at this point, one of the two Republican candidates for Governor of Minnesota have signed the Never Again Pledge! You can thank Mike by emailing him at mike@mikemurphyformn.com [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=5) **Here at Action 4 Liberty, we work to cut through the smoke and mirrors that these politicians try peddling to us. And that's why this pledge is so important. It separates the serious players from the pretenders!** This election could not have higher stakes! After what Governor Walz just did to our small businesses, youth athletes and nursing home patients, we can't afford to have him re-elected. And we also can't afford to have Walz puppets like Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard back up at the Capitol. Fortunately, Action 4 Liberty is doing something about it. We just hit our 20,000th door this week up on the Iron Range. Our field team is talking to voters every day who voted for Walz, but now say NEVER AGAIN! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=6 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=7)
---
I just got off the phone with the newest doorknocker we hired. He'll be up in Sandstede's district this Saturday, talking to voters and updating voter information in the hottest pickup district for us!
It's because of YOU that we will eventually send Julie Sandstede and the other Walz puppets packing. And it's because of YOU that we are able to finding every voter in Greater Minnesota who is ready to FIRE TIM WALZ!
**Please continue supporting our cause by donating today.[Help us with a contribution of $100. If that's too much, $50 or even $25 goes along way. Or, if you can do more, sponsor a doorknocker for a week with a donation of $1000. That pays for wages, gas & lit!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=8)**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_jensen_won_t_p&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Accountability Project
body:
America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration from the dangerously radical Biden Immigration Agenda!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch's **Biden Accountability Project** is investigating shady Biden family activities with foreign entities tied to China and Ukraine. To date, we _have filed more than a dozen Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests and lawsuits_ against the Justice Department, State Department and Secret Service seeking records relating to our concerns over the following:

* Hunter Biden's business with Burisma Holdings, the knowingly corrupt energy company _which paid Hunter $1 million a year to influence U.S. policy when his father was then-President Obama 's designated "point man" in Ukraine_.
* Then-Vice President Biden's corrupt threat (captured on video) to withhold hundreds of millions of dollars in congressionally appropriated aid and loan guarantees for Ukraine.

* The FBI seizure of a laptop and hard drive containing emails and video from Hunter Biden which reportedly contain information related to illicit Biden family business dealings in China while Joe Biden was Vice President.

**All the evidence to date points to some very serious allegations \-- which is why _[I hope you will help out by making a tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53254&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjYwMDU2Mjg=)_. **
**_[Your support now is especially important](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53254&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjYwMDU2Mjg=)_** as we are engaged in our largest and most important caseload ever.
Judicial Watch has become the most effective government watchdog group in the nation. We fight public corruption and government secrecy wherever we find it... _and we are committed to holding powerful politicians and public officials of both political parties accountable under the law to the American people_ _._
We work every day through the legal system. We dig in and never give up. And **_[we rely on patriots like ot you support our work](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53254&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjYwMDU2Mjg=)_**. Thank you.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055709:68ODWfuNf:m:1:3206719985:596389A6445387B644CF78F46463A22F:r "Headline") Peter: You may think Stacey Abrams is not a threat because she didn't win the Georgia race for Governor in 2018, but I'm here to tell you that if we don't stop her now, her meteoric rise in progressive circles has her well on her way to winning the White House within a matter of a few years. Stacey Abrams was determined to deliver 2 U.S. Senate seats to Democrats by hook or by crook and she did just that in January. Now that she's the darling of the left, she's taking her "voter registration" efforts national thanks to the support of the progressive millionaires and billionaires who are backing her efforts and gaining her support among tens of millions of voters. Meanwhile the liberals in Washington are doing their part by trampling on our rights as voters through their disastrous HR1 "For the People" proposal that reads like a communist manifesto. **Together, they could change the political landscape in America for generations - unless we stand up RIGHT NOW.** **[Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already- all we need is your immediate support to get started.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055709:68ODWfuNf:m:1:3206719985:596389A6445387B644CF78F46463A22F:r "Someone needs to stand up to Stacey Abrams, and the New Journey PAC is on the ground already – all we need is your immediate support to
get started.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055709:68ODWfuNf:m:1:3206719985:596389A6445387B644CF78F46463A22F:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started the New Journey to make Black America Conservative Again. We are fighting the entire liberal racist establishment as they spend millions of dollars to steal ANOTHER election. **[We are seeking to open offices in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055709:68ODWfuNf:m:1:3206719985:596389A6445387B644CF78F46463A22F:r "We are seeking to open offices
in Georgia to counter the Stacey Abrams machine, and we need you to stand with us and rush an EMERGENCY donation to this effort before it is too
late.")** **Stacey is a progressive hero, more powerful than AOC, and can do no wrong with the liberal media, even though she was under investigation for seeking to "aggressively" register "ineligible, out-of-state, or deceased voters" before the state's Jan. 5 Senate runoff elections.** None of that matters to liberals. Just take HR1, a bill that could be headed to President Biden's desk in a few WEEKS. This bill will DESTROY the American voting system and take away every protection we have against socialism, all at the stroke of a pen. None of it matters, so long as Democrats win. We don't have time to wait - the New Journey PAC is fighting alone, and we badly need your help. **[Please make an emergency donation in the next 24 hours so we can fight the good fight in Georgia, and anywhere else Stacey Abrams tries her shenanigans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055709:68ODWfuNf:m:1:3206719985:596389A6445387B644CF78F46463A22F:r "Please make an emergency donation in the next 24 hours so we can

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Reporting live from the border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Friend,

Today I'm headed down to the southern border to see the disaster that has been caused by the Biden administration's policies.

Thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding the border every day. Hundreds have tested positive for Covid-19. Centers are overcrowded. Children are sleeping on floors. Drug cartels and transnational criminal organizations are using it as a pipeline. And the media has been denied access for weeks.

The Biden administration says they are opening the borders to be humane. But they are guaranteeing inhumanity. Not only was this predictable; it was predicted.

As Chairman of Homeland Security, I held over three dozen hearings on this, and I believe that this is only the tip of the iceberg, Friend. Once word gets out that the southern border is open, thousands more illegal immigrants will surge and seek to enter illegally.

Despite this, Biden and the Democrats refuse to acknowledge this disaster. Where is the liberal media uproar labeling these facilities as cages and inhumane? Where is President Biden? And why do Democrats refuse to call this what it is -- a crisis?

But because I'm speaking up and revealing the truth, the left will be relentless against me. They are already planning their attack ads and smear campaigns to try and expand their Majority so they can continue their reckless and abhorrent governance.

That is why I need your help. We need to ensure we have resources to respond. [**Any amount you can give will be greatly appreciated. $25, $50, or even $100 will put us one step closer to accomplishing our goal.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00161OMG0SPCGkWafjnFuuXu9kxZkzp3hwVjfsoMnPGOe1nWlJ0ZrIYtPO5sUKFLdEcWd132cqTu9iBd0r-oWIJRrlW8jl92N9ybzt0-NsW-lfw9xlMLjukRcLf-3Wv8_SK4R5L7v3PEIue0EbyXlz0jCH_Vxh6L2BdWjwZnA7uWFf79zjAfxi4YO0Alc_v3h-D9UsUcgD7hP8eKXkUc0gjxpAka8iePTZuoCsrUWUkYR4NXaOI2Xxobzt_1BA_qb6m7LLeDJIQfWMEF3HbErqX3aiFE60_EhkWiVpNtK9G7Cuj7bnjN_dTuNJfA4KSGH8HNjv5LCSgWRZd8Z1-T6K-dYv03T9NAvo580tr5GaZmLcV9NnBRZNMGL1zKHQA9m6jdXYWjWLp4LxzhXD_LnXU5q8uGGZv5GHx&c=HjX63ZyZtsP3pTtR7jQAdfUXCVt285P8l1PQc8pdAnchcdOZYx8X6Q==&ch=2mWHtebSSVrkfYzTpl4p6gXlzLIjdvpFMw0gbqycGkRQjMAatR0oEw==)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: May I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Anyone considering challenging this movement is going to take a very close look at our fundraising.
#

**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our first FEC quarterly fundraising deadline — which is in 5 days. My team has set a goal to raise $50,000 by then.**
Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-march-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26774591/278013606/1108841609?refcode2=91e2be9a-528e-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210326-2-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWUyYmU5YS01MjhlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ya_rQNmmFphKpdcXGJ5FcR7SU8UgGCJPjKVovxpS3aM=)**).
The House has passed a lot of very important legislation this quarter. The For The People Act will save our democracy, end right-wing gerrymandering of Congressional districts, and make every aspect of our elections — from running for office to supporting political candidates — more accessible for the average American.
The American Dream and Promise Act will finally give our Dreamers a path to citizenship. The PRO Act will protect our workers and the right to organize. The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act will help to end systemic racism in law enforcement. Two bills have passed that will mandate background checks for all gun purchases and close loopholes that made it possible for dangerous people to bypass them and acquire weapons.
Right now, all of these bills and many more are at a standstill due to the Jim Crow filibuster in the Senate — but that doesn’t mean we have no shot at getting them signed into law.
Our movement is about more than one bill, one legislator, or one issue. It is about sustained pressure on both houses of Congress and the White House to enact policy that levels the playing field for working people and brings opportunity and justice to communities that have long been overlooked by politicians.
And we are making progress. The Jim Crow filibuster used to be considered par for the course by the vast majority of legislators in both parties. More and more Democrats are now coming to realize how destructive it has become, due to Mitch McConnell’s master manipulations.
I’m working hard in Congress to keep up the pressure and help pass more progressive legislation that would change the game for working people, but I can’t ignore the reality that we could very soon face a primary challenge — and anyone who considers challenging this movement is going to take a very close look at our first quarterly fundraising report of the cycle.
Last year, our people-powered movement emerged victorious in a crowded primary field that included many better-funded candidates, including a self-funding billionaire and several backed by special interests. We have to expect that could happen again and prepare accordingly.
**[If you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities. We cannot wait until a challenger announces to start preparing for the next election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26774594/278013608/1108841609?refcode2=91e2be9a-528e-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&refcode=em210326-2-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWUyYmU5YS01MjhlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ya_rQNmmFphKpdcXGJ5FcR7SU8UgGCJPjKVovxpS3aM=)**
I’m confident that our people-powered movement will win again this cycle — but only with your help.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: Anyone considering challenging this movement is going to take a very close look at our fundraising. I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our first FEC quarterly fundraising deadline — which is in 5 days. My team has set a goal to raise $50,000 by then. Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: =). The House has passed a lot of very important legislation this quarter. The For The People Act will save our democracy, end right-wing gerrymandering of Congressional districts, and make every aspect of our elections — from running for office to supporting political candidates — more accessible for the average American. The American Dream and Promise Act will finally give our Dreamers a path to citizenship. The PRO Act will protect our workers and the right to organize. The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act will help to end systemic racism in law enforcement. Two bills have passed that will mandate background checks for all gun purchases and close loopholes that made it possible for dangerous people to bypass them and acquire weapons. Right now, all of these bills and many more are at a standstill due to the Jim Crow filibuster in the Senate — but that doesn’t mean we have no shot at getting them signed into law. Our movement is about more than one bill, one legislator, or one issue. It is about sustained pressure on both houses of Congress and the White House to enact policy that levels the playing field for working people and brings opportunity and justice to communities that have long been overlooked by politicians. And we are making progress. The Jim Crow filibuster used to be considered par for the course by the vast majority of legislators in both parties. More and more Democrats are now coming to realize how destructive it has become, due to Mitch McConnell’s master manipulations. I’m working hard in Congress to keep up the pressure and help pass more progressive legislation that would change the game for working people, but I can’t ignore the reality that we could very soon face a primary challenge — and anyone who considers challenging this movement is going to take a very close look at our first quarterly fundraising report of the cycle. Last year, our people-powered movement emerged victorious in a crowded primary field that included many better-funded candidates, including a self-funding billionaire and several backed by special interests. We have to expect that could happen again and prepare accordingly. = I’m confident that our people-powered movement will win again this cycle — but only with your help. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: John Burke
subject: It’s time for new leadership in CA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Kevin Faulconer has a plan to fix California’s broken unemployment system. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ed855bb41fb5a2d1/de78d984254121e0c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, California’s unemployment system is broken because of Gavin Newsom's mismanagement. Families are struggling. Many are forced to choose between putting food on the table or paying their bills to keep the lights on. **Meanwhile, the state admitted to sending at least $11 billion in unemployment claims to criminals in 2020 — but the fraud figure could be as high as $30 billion!** There are human consequences to failed leadership, but thankfully we have a candidate who has the experience it’s going to take to fix our broken unemployment system. Kevin Faulconer held a press conference this week in Bakersfield to share his plan to reform and overhaul California’s Employment Development Department. He took on corruption and dysfunction as the Mayor of San Diego, and now he’s ready to tackle issues at the state level and get the Golden State back on track! **[You can read more about Kevin’s press conference and hear how he’s planning to fix our broken unemployment system HERE.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ed855bb41fb5a2d1/8e62803d54fb48d6c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** **[For a more in-depth look at Kevin’s plan, please visit our campaign website HERE.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ed855bb41fb5a2d1/24ffb8888f8430b4c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** It’s time for a new direction in California. It’s time for a leader who will actually change things for the better, end fraud and corruption, and bring a better tomorrow to our great state. For our future,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ed855bb41fb5a2d1/4487fae4199ffd48c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ed855bb41fb5a2d1/f3c7b923cd280d8dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/ed855bb41fb5a2d1/5f2ada55aa1c63acc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Pamela Tucker
subject: Plans on Monday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Hope to see you!
Derek,
We're excited to have President Trump's Secretary of State, the **Honorable Michael R. Pompeo** , speak with us Monday night and we want YOU to join us!
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fvirtual-fundraiser-with-pompeo%2F/1/010001786eb16930-7205bd16-7a06-4add-a243-322f12f2788f-000000/ZYh3sVf6eYzcQKx_m_XloHhCvks=207)
Secretary Pompeo is joining us in support of our efforts to elect Bill Boyd as Merrimack's next State Representative. We look forward to hearing Secretary Pompeo's thoughts on the current administration as well as his focus on future elections and how we can elect more Republicans.
The virtual event starts at 5 PM on Monday, March 29th - [we hope you can make it!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fvirtual-fundraiser-with-pompeo%2F/2/010001786eb16930-7205bd16-7a06-4add-a243-322f12f2788f-000000/IIJkDSxooEfaU3FVj67d_i1Njec=207)
Regards,
Pamela Tucker
NHGOP Vice Chair

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Indiana is Moving Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb drew up our game plan for the fourth quarter of the pandemic. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470350?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Indiana is Moving Forward**_ Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb drew up our game plan for the fourth quarter of the pandemic. As he said, Indiana is in a better place now than we were 3 months ago and we’re moving forward because of the diligence of Hoosiers. Because of that diligence and our best-in-the-nation vaccine rollout, the governor outlined a number of important changes for our state. Beginning March 31, **_ALL HOOSIERS_** 16 and over will be eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. Additionally, on April 6 all statewide restrictions on businesses and capacity limits at bars, restaurants, and entertainment venues will end, as will the statewide mask mandate. We must remain vigilant and take proper precautions, but the governor’s announcements this week give us additional hope that the spring and summer will be seasons of recovery and rejuvenation in Indiana.

Also this week, your Indiana Republican State Committee met to elect officers for the next four years. I was honored to be reelected to a new four-year term. The mission in 2022 is reelecting Senator Todd Young and our House delegation, protecting our legislative supermajorities, and electing our Republican statewide candidates. That work begins now. I’m excited to partner with Vice chair Holli Sullivan, Treasurer Chuck Williams, Secretary Mary Martin, and the rest of the Republican team to keep our winning streak going.

I know I joined many of you in watching March Madness games this past week. I also likely joined many of you in having a busted bracket! However poorly our predictions may have turned out, I think we can all take pride in seeing some of our great basketball cathedrals—Assembly Hall, Bankers Life Fieldhouse, The Coliseum, Hinkle Fieldhouse, Lucas Oil Stadium, and Mackey Arena—safely host the most exciting sports weekend of the year. As the tournaments enters it’s second weekend, I wanted to offer my thanks and congratulations to the army of professionals and volunteers that’s made this possible.

Thanks Kyle

_**Photo:** __State Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Vice chair Indiana Secretary of State Holli Sullivan at this week’s meeting of the IRSC. Treasurer Chuck Williams and Secretary Mary Martin participated virtually._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**We're in the Fourth Quarter**_ On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb** delivered a statewide address to speak to Hoosiers about moving forward in our fight against COVID-19. As **Governor Holcom** b said, we’re entering the fourth quarter in our pandemic response. Vaccine availability is such that we can continue moving forward and soon, hopefully, put the pandemic in the rearview mirror. **_“Today, we’re in a different and better place,” Governor Holcomb._** Here are some ways we’re **moving forward** over the next few weeks:
* **On March 31, ALL Hoosiers aged 16 and over will be eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine.**
* This is made possible by Indiana’s best-in-the-nation vaccine rollout and increases in vaccine allotments from the federal government
* The state will schedule additional mass vaccination clinics. We’ll make sure to share details as they become available.
* To schedule your vaccine appointment call 2-1-1 or visit [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f1ec72be1&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* **On April 6, statewide business restrictions and capacity limits at bars, restaurants, and entertainment venues will end.**
* All decisions about capacity limits will be made by local officials
* **Also on April 6, the statewide mask mandate will expire.**
* Face coverings will remain mandatory in all state facilities and all COVID testing and vaccination sites.
* K-12 schools will continue operating under current requirements through the remainder of the 2020-2021 school year

**Governor Holcomb** shared some important data points that demonstrate that Hoosier vigilance is having a positive impact in fighting the virus. Our current cases, positivity rate, hospitalization and deaths have all dropped drastically:
* The state has the capacity to test 50,000 Hoosiers **A DAY** for COVID-19. Last spring we could only do a couple hundred a day.
* Only 4.6% of ICU beds are being used to treat COVID patients; last fall it was 44%.
* Approximately 600 Hoosiers are hospitalized for COVID. Last December it was 3,500.
* More than **970,000** Hoosiers are **_fully vaccinated_**. That number is **_growing_** every day.
* 27% of Hoosiers have had at least the first dose of vaccine.

As Indiana moves forward, it is **still important** to:
* Isolate if you test positive for COVID-19
* Follow CDC guidelines if you’re a close contact to someone who is COVID positive
* Stay home if you are sick
* If you have symptoms, get tested. Testing is still free
* Social distance where you can
* Wash your hands and be uber cautious around at-risk populations

**_“As we continue to do these few things, the light at the end of the tunnel becomes brighter and brighter.” -Governor Holcomb_** You can read the governor’s speech [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d8350fa4d1&e=1acd9bb3d6) and watch the video [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c516ef551a&e=1acd9bb3d6). To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c25bbb4ac9&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b8d874ac1&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34d6bd5438&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb delivering his statewide address_
---
|
---
| _**COVID-19 Vaccine News**_ Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health are continuing to lead one of the most effective vaccine rollouts in the nation. COVID-19 vaccine eligibility expanded again this week to Hoosiers aged 40 and up.

And that's not all the good news we have to share this week! Beginning March 31, **_ALL HOOSIERS_** 16 and over will be eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine.

To find out if you’re eligible and to schedule your shot, call 211 or go to [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1388d31a8&e=1acd9bb3d6).
[\--> If you are eligible, click here to register for your COVID-19 Vaccine <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d746c8a481&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**Meeting Sister Jean**_ Governor Holcomb and the First Lady Janet Holcomb had the honor to meet the Loyola Ramblers' number one fan, Sister Jean! We wish her the best as she continues to enjoy her time in Indiana.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=16e53331b9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Attorney General Todd Rokita testified against HR 1**_ Despite it’s patriotic-sounding name, Democrats’ “For the People Act” is a dire threat to election integrity. You can view Attorney General Rokita’s opening statement here: [https://www.facebook.com/ToddRokitaIN/posts/10159127426013252](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b2b16f9f46&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[delivers statewide COVID-19 update](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3450e4713e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[celebrates National Ag Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=81783e670f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[is leading bipartisan plan to hold China accountable](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efdcafc594&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun's **[bill to help ALS patients is signed into law](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12537287a5&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb drew up our game plan for the fourth quarter of the pandemic. | | | | | | | | Indiana is Moving Forward Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb drew up our game plan for the fourth quarter of the pandemic. As he said, Indiana is in a better place now than we were 3 months ago and we’re moving forward because of the diligence of Hoosiers. Because of that diligence and our best-in-the-nation vaccine rollout, the governor outlined a number of important changes for our state. Beginning March 31, ALL HOOSIERS 16 and over will be eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. Additionally, on April 6 all statewide restrictions on businesses and capacity limits at bars, restaurants, and entertainment venues will end, as will the statewide mask mandate. We must remain vigilant and take proper precautions, but the governor’s announcements this week give us additional hope that the spring and summer will be seasons of recovery and rejuvenation in Indiana. Also this week, your Indiana Republican State Committee met to elect officers for the next four years. I was honored to be reelected to a new four-year term. The mission in 2022 is reelecting Senator Todd Young and our House delegation, protecting our legislative supermajorities, and electing our Republican statewide candidates. That work begins now. I’m excited to partner with Vice chair Holli Sullivan, Treasurer Chuck Williams, Secretary Mary Martin, and the rest of the Republican team to keep our winning streak going. I know I joined many of you in watching March Madness games this past week. I also likely joined many of you in having a busted bracket! However poorly our predictions may have turned out, I think we can all take pride in seeing some of our great basketball cathedrals—Assembly Hall, Bankers Life Fieldhouse, The Coliseum, Hinkle Fieldhouse, Lucas Oil Stadium, and Mackey Arena—safely host the most exciting sports weekend of the year. As the tournaments enters it’s second weekend, I wanted to offer my thanks and congratulations to the army of professionals and volunteers that’s made this possible. Thanks Kyle Photo: State Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Vice chair Indiana Secretary of State Holli Sullivan at this week’s meeting of the IRSC. Treasurer Chuck Williams and Secretary Mary Martin participated virtually. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | We're in the Fourth Quarter On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb delivered a statewide address to speak to Hoosiers about moving forward in our fight against COVID-19. As Governor Holcom b said, we’re entering the fourth quarter in our pandemic response. Vaccine availability is such that we can continue moving forward and soon, hopefully, put the pandemic in the rearview mirror. “Today, we’re in a different and better place,” Governor Holcomb. Here are some ways we’re moving forward over the next few weeks: On March 31, ALL Hoosiers aged 16 and over will be eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. This is made possible by Indiana’s best-in-the-nation vaccine rollout and increases in vaccine allotments from the federal government The state will schedule additional mass vaccination clinics. We’ll make sure to share details as they become available. To schedule your vaccine appointment call 2-1-1 or visit . On April 6, statewide business restrictions and capacity limits at bars, restaurants, and entertainment venues will end. All decisions about capacity limits will be made by local officials Also on April 6, the statewide mask mandate will expire. Face coverings will remain mandatory in all state facilities and all COVID testing and vaccination sites. K-12 schools will continue operating under current requirements through the remainder of the 2020-2021 school year Governor Holcomb shared some important data points that demonstrate that Hoosier vigilance is having a positive impact in fighting the virus. Our current cases, positivity rate, hospitalization and deaths have all dropped drastically: The state has the capacity to test 50,000 Hoosiers A DAY for COVID-19. Last spring we could only do a couple hundred a day. Only 4.6% of ICU beds are being used to treat COVID patients; last fall it was 44%. Approximately 600 Hoosiers are hospitalized for COVID. Last December it was 3,500. More than 970,000 Hoosiers are fully vaccinated. That number is growing every day. 27% of Hoosiers have had at least the first dose of vaccine. As Indiana moves forward, it is still important to: Isolate if you test positive for COVID-19 Follow CDC guidelines if you’re a close contact to someone who is COVID positive Stay home if you are sick If you have symptoms, get tested. Testing is still free Social distance where you can Wash your hands and be uber cautious around at-risk populations “As we continue to do these few things, the light at the end of the tunnel becomes brighter and brighter.” -Governor Holcomb You can read the governor’s speech and watch the video . To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , , and ! Photo: Governor Holcomb delivering his statewide address | | COVID-19 Vaccine News Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health are continuing to lead one of the most effective vaccine rollouts in the nation. COVID-19 vaccine eligibility expanded again this week to Hoosiers aged 40 and up. And that's not all the good news we have to share this week! Beginning March 31, ALL HOOSIERS 16 and over will be eligible to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. To find out if you’re eligible and to schedule your shot, call 211 or go to . | | | | Meeting Sister Jean Governor Holcomb and the First Lady Janet Holcomb had the honor to meet the Loyola Ramblers' number one fan, Sister Jean! We wish her the best as she continues to enjoy her time in Indiana. | | | Attorney General Todd Rokita testified against HR 1 Despite it’s patriotic-sounding name, Democrats’ “For the People Act” is a dire threat to election integrity. You can view Attorney General Rokita’s opening statement here: | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun's Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved._

subject: The Democrats are emptying their bank accounts

The Far Left has been emptying their bank accounts and spending millions of dollars to hold onto their slim House Majority and take back my seat. Last time, they spent over _$20 million_ just to make sure _my_ conservative voice wasn't heard in Congress. _They failed... and now they are now doubling down._ That's why I am reaching out to you today. If we are going to keep up with their reckless spending and keep conservative voices heard in California and in D.C., I need to reach this critical goal. To: <> POLITICO: "Democrats are dead serious about taking back that Iowa seat." Friend, This is NOT going away! We still need signatures to send a LOUD message to Pelosi and the Democrats in Washington who are trying to OVERTURN a state-certified election in Iowa. Pelosi FAILED to defend her razor thin House Majority and now Democrats are trying to ABUSE their control in the House and Senate to rewrite the rules for elections. We must stop them! The votes have been counted and recounted. The election has been certified. The REPUBLICAN winner has been sworn-in to serve in the U.S. House! Let Pelosi and the Democrats know they cant change the rules of our elections to work in their favor! body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26780309/278033976/-333616605?refcode=email_20210326_SA_ACA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmVjYmY2MS02MjhlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5vfUoRNlFgVuWo2sBJFAZTHIPIp0MvuOdVeAeMPKAg=) Friend, We have a gun violence epidemic in this country, and our lawmakers must do everything in their power to address it. Serve America is proud to support comprehensive gun safety reform, including expanded background checks like those enumerated in H.R. 8, the Bipartisan Background Checks Act, which was passed by a bipartisan majority in the House of Representatives earlier this month. Eighteen incumbents endorsed by Serve America joined in supporting H.R. 8 when it came to the floor. Many of those incumbents used and trained with firearms while serving in the military and intelligence communities, and every single one of them has a personal stake in putting an end to the gun violence plaguing every American community. Serve America is particularly proud of the leadership demonstrated by Congressman Joe Neguse, whose community of Boulder, Colorado, was the latest stricken by senseless gun violence. For those of us fortunate to have survived the past year, one of the most harrowing in living memory, we cannot afford for a return to so-called ‘normalcy’ to mean a return to the extraordinary levels of gun violence unique to the American experience. We know expanded background checks, and other common-sense reforms like an assault weapons ban, are the only way to end the rampant gun violence terrorizing our nation. **The House has done its part, the Senate must now do their duty and ensure that common-sense gun safety reforms become the law of the land.** [**Will you add your name to our petition calling on the Senate to act quickly and pass H.R. 8 and other common-sense reforms that will make America safer and stronger?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26780310/278033981/770120176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmVjYmY2MS02MjhlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5vfUoRNlFgVuWo2sBJFAZTHIPIp0MvuOdVeAeMPKAg=&emci=eed524a2-608e-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=4fecbf61-628e-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26780311/278033982/770120176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmVjYmY2MS02MjhlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5vfUoRNlFgVuWo2sBJFAZTHIPIp0MvuOdVeAeMPKAg=&emci=eed524a2-608e-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=4fecbf61-628e-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=194769) Enough is enough. The overwhelming majority of Americans support basic, common-sense gun safety measures. Despite the political division in this country, Democrats, Independents, and Republicans are mostly united on this issue. _**We are demanding change.**_ Thank you for taking the time to make your voice heard today. -Serve America [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26780312/278033983/-333616605?refcode=email_20210326_SA_ACA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmVjYmY2MS02MjhlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5vfUoRNlFgVuWo2sBJFAZTHIPIp0MvuOdVeAeMPKAg=)

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
body:
-October 30, 2020-

-FOUR days until the election-

There are just FOUR days until the most critical election of our lives. Health care, public education, reproductive freedom, equality, and voting rights are all on the ballot.

Do you know how you’re voting this year?

Use our tool to find out who’s on your ballot + where and when you can vote here [https://www.indems.org/find-out-whos-on-your-ballot/] .

Need more info on your voting options? Want to know what to bring to vote? Check out our 2020 Voter Guide [https://www.indems.org/how-to-vote-in-2020/] .

Do you still need to return your vote-by-mail ballot?

We no longer suggest mailing in your ballot. Instead, take it directly to your county clerk [https://www.indems.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/countyclerkoffices2020.pdf] by noon on election day, Nov. 3.

If you (1) never received your ballot , (2) lost your ballot , (3) have a spoiled ballot , or (4) can't make the noon deadline , YOU CAN STILL VOTE! Visit our troubleshooting page [https://www.indems.org/mailin-fix/] for more information.

Don’t forget you can always call our voter protection hotline at 317-261-3820 or email us general voting questions at voting@indems.org .

GOTV Phone Banking [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/Election%20Night%20Live.%20Email%20%283%29.png]

Sign up for a shift of virtual phone banking.
Then, we'll send you a Zoom link to join the party!
All times in EDT.

-Our 2020 election night live stream-

Election Night Live! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/1_30.png]

Come watch the election results roll in with your favorite INDems!

Our hosts, IDP Chairman, John Zody and IDP Deputy Chair of Engagement, "Indiana's Own" Dana Black, will be joined by party leaders for some lively discussions. Plus, you'll hear from candidates up and down the ballot!

You can join us on Facebook Live [https://www.facebook.com/116924065002990/posts/3860255990669760/] or YouTube [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WwGVVHxm1ls] @ 7 PM EDT on Tuesday, 11/3.

clean_body: -October 30, 2020- -FOUR days until the election- There are just FOUR days until the most critical election of our lives. Health care, public education, reproductive freedom, equality, and voting rights are all on the ballot. Do you know how you’re voting this year? Use our tool to find out who’s on your ballot + where and when you can vote here [] . Need more info on your voting options? Want to know what to bring to vote? Check out our 2020 Voter Guide [] . Do you still need to return your vote-by-mail ballot? We no longer suggest mailing in your ballot. Instead, take it directly to your county clerk [] by noon on election day, Nov. 3. If you (1) never received your ballot , (2) lost your ballot , (3) have a spoiled ballot , or (4) can't make the noon deadline , YOU CAN STILL VOTE! Visit our troubleshooting page [] for more information. Don’t forget you can always call our voter protection hotline at 317-261-3820 or email us general voting questions at voting@indems.org . GOTV Phone Banking [] Sign up for a shift of virtual phone banking. Then, we'll send you a Zoom link to join the party! All times in EDT. SATURDAY, Oct. 31 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] SUNDAY, Nov. 1 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] MONDAY, Nov. 2 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] TUESDAY, Nov. 2 9 AM - 12 PM [] 12 PM - 3 PM [] 3 PM - 6 PM [] -Our 2020 election night live stream- Election Night Live! [] Come watch the election results roll in with your favorite INDems! Our hosts, IDP Chairman, John Zody and IDP Deputy Chair of Engagement, "Indiana's Own" Dana Black, will be joined by party leaders for some lively discussions. Plus, you'll hear from candidates up and down the ballot! You can join us on Facebook Live [] or YouTube [] @ 7 PM EDT on Tuesday, 11/3. -2020 Resources- The 2020 Voter Guide [] - everything you need to know to vote this year Find your early vote location here [] Find out who is running in your district here [] . Tutorial [] on how to vote by mail in Hamilton County Tutorial [] on how to vote by mail in Lake County Voter protection line: call 317-261-3820 for help with registration, voting by mail, or voter suppression. Voting help email: voting@indems.org for general voting questions. Check out our list of ways to get involved [] this year. Check out our event list here [] or see the bottom of this email for events happening soon! -Resources for campaigns- The 2020 Candidate Toolbox is equipped with voter education content, campaign tips, Indiana stats, and other digital content for Hoosier Dems running for office in 2020. Email zking@indems.org for access. We've added new webinars [] to help candidates adjust to campaigning during a public health crisis. Check them out today! -Other Resources- Sign our petition to stand up for Black Hoosiers here [] . Read our blog post on how to be an ally to Black and brown communities here [] . name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: TUESDAY: Breaking Up Health Care Monopolies w/ Rep. Cori Bush, Economic Liberties & People's Action
body:
The Latest Event in the Break 'Em Up Series

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3d126f74841d/join-rep-cori-bush-me-economic-liberties-peoples-action-for-the-next-break-em-up-event-5073344?e=e870238275)
RSVP (https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN__86DTVy6SMS2LgMU0EyDkw?emci=93ba5696-c088-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=3055180)

COVID-19 has levied a heavy toll on the health of our country over the past year, particularly for communities of color. Some of the challenges in managing the pandemic are because of our reliance on a private insurance system, which impacts access and costs of care. But poor outcomes, high costs, and lack of access are caused or exacerbated by a problem that policymakers could begin to address today—unchecked monopoly power.

Long before the pandemic, from hospitals to Big Pharma to medical supplies, the extreme market power of large corporations that put profits over people hurt patients, health care workers, and communities. If we don't break these giants up, these monopolies will continue using their power to limit access to care and create medical deserts, while raising costs, lowering quality of care, and abusing health care workers.

On March 30 at 2:00 p.m. ET, please join Economic Liberties, People’s Action, Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01), and leading experts and advocates to learn why we need leaders at all levels of government to fight corporate health care monopolies to make our health care system more equitable and resilient. This is the second event in our Break ‘Em Up: Redistributing Power to the People series, which highlights how progressives can organize around anti-monopoly fights to advance economic and racial justice. The first (https://www.economicliberties.us/event/break-em-up-redistributing-economic-power-to-the-people/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) focused on how to center worker rights in corporate power fights.

Date: March 30, 2021

Time: 2:00 - 3:30 PM ET
RSVP (https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN__86DTVy6SMS2LgMU0EyDkw?emci=93ba5696-c088-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=3055180)

Opening Remarks:

Sarah Miller (https://www.economicliberties.us/sarah-miller/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Director, American Economic Liberties Project

Keynote Remarks:

Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01) (https://bush.house.gov/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , member of the House Judiciary and Oversight and Reform Committees

2:15pm - Panel 1: How Health Care Monopolies Worsened the Impact of COVID-19

Jean Ross (https://www.nationalnursesunited.org/about?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , RN, President, National Nurses United

Abdul El Sayed (http://abdulelsayed.com/about?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Physician, Epidemiologist, Former City Health Commissioner, Progressive Activist, Author of The Incision (https://incision.substack.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) and Medicare for All: A Citizen’s Guide (http://medicareforallbook.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) & host of the podcast “America Dissected.”

Zephyr Teachout (https://www.fordham.edu/info/23186/zephyr_teachout?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Professor, Fordham Law School and author of Break 'Em Up: Recovering Our Freedom from Big Ag, Big Tech, and Big Money (https://us.macmillan.com/books/9781250200891?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}})

Moderated by Morgan Harper (https://www.economicliberties.us/morgan-harper/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Advisor, American Economic Liberties Project

2:45pm - Panel 2: Solutions to Tackle Monopoly Power in the Health Care Industry

Lisa Frank (https://www.uniteforpa.com/meet_lisa_frank?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Vice President and Director of Strategic Campaigns, SEIU PA

Olivia Webb (https://www.economicliberties.us/olivia-webb/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Policy Analyst, American Economic Liberties Project

Mike Bowen (https://www.dallasnews.com/news/2020/05/14/two-years-ago-mike-bowen-of-prestige-ameritech-warned-of-n-95-mask-shortages-heres-what-he-said/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Vice President, Prestige Ameritech

Moderated by George Goehl (https://peoplesaction.org/about/george-goehl-executive-director/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Director, People’s Action

Closing Remarks:

Morgan Harper (https://www.economicliberties.us/morgan-harper/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Advisor, American Economic Liberties Project

Additional Resources from Economic Liberties:

Courage to Learn: Health Care, (https://www.economicliberties.us/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/Courage-to-Learn_HealthCare_Designed_1.11.pdf?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) American Economic Liberties Project

“A Shot in the Arm: How Government Succeed in Coronavirus Vaccine Development, and Failed in Distribution (https://prospect.org/coronavirus/shot-in-the-arm-coronavirus-vaccine-development/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) ,” The American Prospect

Acute Condition (https://www.acutecondition.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , newsletter by Economic Liberties’ Olivia Webb

About the “Break ‘Em Up” Series:

Economic Liberties and People's Action's “Break ‘Em Up!” series brings together a diverse range of progressive voices to share information about the ways unchecked corporate power is hurting workers, small businesses, communities, and our democracy. Watch our previous event on taking on monopolies to strengthen worker power, featuring Senator Bernie Sanders, here (https://www.economicliberties.us/event/break-em-up-redistributing-economic-power-to-the-people/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) .
RSVP (https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN__86DTVy6SMS2LgMU0EyDkw?emci=93ba5696-c088-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=3055180)

============================================================

You can ** update your preferences (https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=3cbabd4dc2&e=e870238275&c=42be95a1d8)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Left’s False Narratives on Shootings Exposed
body:
CNN and Democrats want Americans to believe that the two recent mass shootings in Colorado and Atlanta were tied to racism and mental illness.
---
CNN and Democrats want Americans to believe that the two recent mass shootings in Colorado and Atlanta were tied to racism and mental illness.
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/jMIQlJqCR2WvdxzlkS6Cwn6AkVds2_Gs2IAcQdDMIl7up7WDwNP88zCMzVYgAIimrITHP73usqPkWt-vFgaJlOXn2iQdRXBa-sK3T023QY6LTeHt7CfTbsbjGRUyHUo1CRZoZmsSMABPuBW1MRlFEEkUgZhak7KU2NfCXe-9pmpewx0Y0bZsBeploapQUXOYLWp967nXPujifokuOy43We5Lj9QMge6Ei4O9FA-VxGoamek1a6MaBQV0y59mf6qLaQHkboHTbnLA00i41AIcD6qR0XiDvZsx0YkuVxGW-doy) CNN and Democrats want Americans to believe that the two recent mass shootings in Colorado and Atlanta were tied to racism and mental illness.

It fits perfectly into their agenda to strip away our Second Amendment Rights.

But this week, I exposed their lies . . . TWICE.

My first scoop came from an individual embedded with Colorado law enforcement: **The Colorado shooter, Ahmad Al Aliwi Alissa, had pledged allegiance to ISIS before the shooting.**

The media was quick to obscure Alissa’s identity and birth nation . . . Syria.

After all, an openly Anti-Semitic Muslim shooting people in a grocery store doesn’t fit their narrative . . .

. . . but it wasn’t just any grocery store – and that’s my second exclusive this week.

Ahmad Alissa murdered 10 people in King Soopers – **a Kosher grocery store**.

**Many of King Soopers Jewish customers were preparing for Passover which starts on Saturday.**

Now, the mainstream media could have researched this on their own . . . and they likely did . . . but reporting the truth about the motivations of this mass murderer wouldn’t have generated cries for Gun Control.

**The TRUTH gives us even MORE reason why we should be prepared to protect ourselves at any time.**

And we need to do MUCH more truthful reporting.

If you’re able, [**help me cover the costs of adding two new writers to my investigative journalism team today**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/2Gnqk_rH8HWo1DETrn5OHWGp2138cTgXY0cFGqc7a77vsHylJCiAsykebIlCt7MNqwJAtyZTmyTRabMdhEPPLwpetu1OUrToecqaPVP9dUnf74emoEtZzN6--lKzZbiKIBjjVNX0PRxogpdxz2vUbPq4AJjNNcA2IVbfG7-t96hf0pGbhQEBtyp4kbAYdfcv2LX7L8FwYKPAQKNhVYYBeOAcDENnfVuPz0E6cAvgXoI9dvCoX2rT_1uSdhtxoRhEHQa5uQ6aVHeKJ0k-c6UPh6XYqoRD3LfkdLxkqjT2mPsj).

[**It’s going to cost me $2,800 per month, if you can chip in with a recurring monthly gift of $10 or more, I’ll be sure you’re among the first to be sent our exclusives and breaking news.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/FC750bLceRLH5SKUTrP8IMC5pFom5Vau_UTzR5FCCVICcMpandcvaIByIe8ZSSP2kP8Xl9BJmfMszeKejvRtPjCnNu0xyAAGtdraDyedY4_6TXtFhtNYkax5JMg7-HXdDmqFruWF4l897R92z6T3l4SvX_ATciycR0XTTQh3W1B8Uz2MyAjTEF0EVVwu0txw4210jUCyvvW0tshFlxSqdmInujXdbD5SSkT5WnRMhkuMWAw-_VjCJFhW75jlQiV_WDbBWXXYvvwVtcSKTZZKXILaswxxdJtqZf8hrYmSCxiA)

Now, let’s step back to the shooting in Atlanta in what the media has been screaming as racism against Asians, because the shootings occurred in Asian Massage Parlors.

That shooter, Robert Long, wasn’t a racist. Instead, he was battling a sex addiction and allegedly frequented those same massage parlors.

The Atlanta shooting had nothing to do with hatred of Asian Americans!

It just so happens that many Asian women are the victims of human trafficking and end up working in those establishments.

The Left had a perfect opportunity to address human trafficking with this issue, but instead, they ran with a false narrative so they could throw in the third rail of politics – racism – to push for gun control!

**Liberals have exploited the deaths of 18 people with false reports to push their political agenda.**
**What’s worse, they IGNORED the Anti-Semitism of Ahmad Alissa that was the only hate-driven crime here!**

We need to do so much better with our media and our reporting – [**and I’m asking for your support to help me do that**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/VldqLEnam5yf6H8Lvz1DjCUxME_FJg5cdtxqQ41aP9R0jAWpKNmrbtpU9khkUkajOu47tz6xk76pKN81GHb86YfHzkEG-GsQc51QargCVRbDiE41mysccfKDez_zIBlBgxElcT82G0U8z0Au8HIL3zRuz4AOfqKpVtrDxiAgXRRFQ7sjwxXIMJkVtPeNLl2tQdV_n3Vbfwt4hmUvEu9zzmEW9PtM6oXdt1HRZdtQYLBeF5OlmRmL6MyVkqa_HhSaXxqiKeCT86GeZ-Sj6FuRHKR8uSB_ZqewYXRZE2pCUEqm).

In 2009, Congress passed the Hate Crimes Prevention Act and Obama signed it.

That Hate Crime legislation was born from another false narrative created by the Left – the murder of Matthew Shepard a young, gay man.

For over a decade after Shepard’s 1998 murder in Wyoming, the LGBTQ community beat the drums that Shepherd was beaten and left for dead by homophobic rednecks who randomly met him in a bar.

What they failed to disclose was that one of Shepard’s killers was his occasional lover and the murder was actually related to an attempt to steal $10,000 of Crystal Meth.

It was a drug run gone bad.

But none of that mattered to the Left. They wanted a new “Hate Crime” law, and they got it.

**Don’t let them strip away our Second Amendment rights based on more false narratives.**

[**Help me continue to expose their lies by supporting my journalism team.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/UojSck6SRXMCLCBs_0Le2U6CQWCtmSWu7BoxVsVujhFLXa9mVyDlHQ16vT920R5JQqzs8NCvHAHsiRNdkeF3n1FnPLsdC0h-yGlNvkUFEV6d9TpFfBdicguEpyRlr6i4Wy7poQGLEDzVBgwKvC06DOdfP8AlXhOIszDhhUUQVc3FfdbIolyuG4w_PA-7cyxYX_tlF3DGcwYrQcGLSqzz9l2Daw3T-o1n06fceNhYpV6DreIaSAL6CkvNmsBYme-EZXoNliW454Un8q5OWIKXgRiEcDzMYp64QNq3PPrHbEsQ)

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "Headline") Peter: A Police Department for politicians, but not for you. That's Nancy Pelosi's new plan. House Democrats already voted to defund **_YOUR_** local police with the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act of 2021 (H.R. 1280), which threatens to take thousands of cops off our streets, but now they want to increase the police force that protects **_THEM_** while stripping you of the police in your community. **[Will you help us defeat H.R. 1280 in the Senate before they defund our community police departments? We can't stop the radical left from their defund agenda without YOUR donation of $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "Will you help us defeat H.R. 1280 in the Senate before they defund
our community police departments? We can’t stop the radical left from their defund agenda without YOUR donation of $25, $50, $100 or more
TODAY!")** Defund Democrats already have 2,000 National Guard troops and 3-miles of wall around the Capitol complex. Now they are demanding even more of your money to protect themselves. **Nancy Pelosi already has a taxpayer-funded security detail of 6 cops, and there are already 4 cops for every Member of Congress on Capitol Hill.** But if her bill passes in the Senate and Biden signs it into law, Nancy Pelosi ALONE will have a larger security detail than most communities. At your expense. **In fact, the Capitol Hill police force is already larger than the police forces of Atlanta, Baltimore, Denver, and Milwaukee:** | _" While Democrats advocated defunding the police, their private police force budget shot up from $375 million in 2016 to $460 million in 2020...The police defunders have a lot more cops than the taxpayers whose police they want to defund."_
---
**And the Left wants to DEFUND YOUR POLICE?**
**[The radical anti-police agenda of the Democrats is making America less safe. If these attacks on our public safety make you furious, please stand with us in law enforcement who are fighting to protect the PEOPLE not just politicians.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "The
radical anti-police agenda of the Democrats is making America less safe. If these attacks on our public safety make you furious, please stand with us
in law enforcement who are fighting to protect the PEOPLE not just politicians.")**
| [STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "STAND WITH
LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY")
---
Police don't matter, walls don't work, and only bad people carry guns? It's all a lie.
Do you think the 6 cops protecting Pelosi are unarmed? Who do they expect will protect you and your family from the next rape, murder, or burglar in your neighborhood?
**The country is crumbling into violence because of the Left 's defund agenda, and they now want to protect themselves while Americans suffer the consequences. BLM and Antifa will be running our communities if we don't stop HR 1280.**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "Defund the Police")I joined the board of the Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC because I was a cop - I know what it means to wear the badge and put my life on the line to keep you safe. I could no longer sit back as politicians pushed the false "systemic racism" narrative to foster their #defund agenda that removes cops from your neighborhood.
**[Help us keep our communities safe by supporting Law Enforcement Officers in America. Donate at least $100 TODAY and help put an end to #defund!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055873:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "Help us keep our communities safe by supporting Law Enforcement
Officers in America. Donate at least $100 TODAY and help put an end to #defund!")**
Politicians aren't a protected class - they're Americans just like the rest of us. All Americans deserve safe neighborhoods, safe workplaces, safe schools, and safe places to worship.
We shouldn't have to worry about the safety of the country our kids are growing up in, but that will change if Pelosi and her radical left allies succeed in passing H.R. 1280!
**[Help ensure our communities remain safe, not just our politicians--Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "Help ensure our communities remain safe, not just our
politicians—Donate TODAY!")**
For your safety,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57055872:6L6ozfuNb:m:1:3206719985:91CD44528EA2B48F55152D3BA30F52DB:r "Tony Palmer")
Tony Palmer, SGT (Ret), Virginia Beach Police Dept
Board Member / Advisor
Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: 1 Out of 100
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
There are 100 U.S. Senators.

There's not a single one like me. There's not a single one like US.

It's time for us to change that. [Donate $20 today and we can change our government and our democracy for the better.](https://act.myngp.com/el/FlIrp8IC8Ezi_hjtyClSAtLseKfRneT4teGj17KTgEo=/75FmtU_gwK-Y0zKbqWQBVWut_ORGVYfE4vahZP8U-xA=?refcode=03/26)

Rural communities deserve a voice.

Black women deserve a voice.

Working people deserve a voice.

Those who have been counted out and left behind deserve a voice. That's who this campaign, who this movement, is about.

We will bring radical love and determination to an establishment plagued by cruelty and inaction.

I will be one out of a hundred, but I will speak with the voice of millions.

I know that together we can accomplish incredible things in DC. But I can't get there without you. [I will spend every day I'm in office stepping up for us but right now I need you to step up for me and our campaign with a donation of any size.](https://act.myngp.com/el/FlIrp8IC8Ezi_hjtyClSAtLseKfRneT4teGj17KTgEo=/75FmtU_gwK-Y0zKbqWQBVWut_ORGVYfE4vahZP8U-xA=?refcode=03/26)

We are the movement that North Carolina and this country have been waiting for. We are the change.

Have a great weekend.

One of us for all of us,
Erica

name: Matt Royer
subject: A note from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
This is Matt Royer, the Campaign Chair for Delegate Ibraheem Samirah’s re-election campaign, and I wanted to reach out to you today in advance of.....

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26790968/278070602/-1287071472?refcode=em210326_mr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjYTRlNi04YThlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ky2O3P1ePQZyiVOdcIuboyWKBK4uXt0ByzodS6HIujk=) Derek, This is Matt Royer, the Campaign Chair for Delegate Ibraheem Samirah’s re-election campaign, and I wanted to reach out to you today in advance of our monumental End of Quarter deadline at the end of the month and to talk to you a bit about why I believe in Ibraheem. This is not only our first End of Quarter filing deadline of the campaign -- but it’s the ONLY filing deadline before our primary in June. **In other words, this is our campaign’s biggest shot to show the world that unabashed Progressives like Ibraheem can raise the money necessary to win without the support of Corporate PACs. ** See, one of the things I admire most about Ibraheem is that he’s willing to work tirelessly to ensure we don’t just talk the talk \-- and while it’d certainly be easier to just take Corporate PAC money -- our team isn’t built that way. [**We rely entirely on grassroots donors like you to help power this campaign and we couldn’t be more grateful. With that in mind, could you click here to donate $25 (or whatever you can afford) today and help us crush this filing deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26790969/278070603/-1287071472?refcode=em210326_mr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjYTRlNi04YThlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ky2O3P1ePQZyiVOdcIuboyWKBK4uXt0ByzodS6HIujk=) This race is incredibly important to me personally because I was born and raised in the 86th district. I want to make sure that my hometown of Herndon is represented by true, strong Progressives and we cannot do that without you or the team that we have. I’m so proud of the campaign we’re building right here in the 86th District. It’s a young, dynamic team that’s working hard to get our message out to as many voters as possible. And, of course, we can’t do it without supporters like you pushing us every step of the way. I’ll be in touch again soon, but I just wanted to say thanks for all you’ve done so far and let’s go to work. In Solidarity,
Matt Royer
| Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. **This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26790970/278070604/-1287071472?refcode=em210326_mr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjYTRlNi04YThlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ky2O3P1ePQZyiVOdcIuboyWKBK4uXt0ByzodS6HIujk=)
---

Herndon, VA 20172

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: C-R-I-S-I-S at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Big Tech will regret BANNING President Trump, and we hope to see you online at its launch!

I'm visiting our southern border today, Friend.

I took a similar trip six weeks ago to see first-hand the unfinished border wall and the holding facilities for unaccompanied minors. I'm very concerned at how quickly the situation has deteriorated.

This is obviously a **CRISIS** - no matter what word the Biden Administration wants to use. **THOUSANDS** of illegal immigrants are crossing the border every day due to **FAILED** Democrat immigration policies.

[**Please join me in DEMANDING that Joe Biden reverse his failed immigration policies.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/lindsey-graham-p/?sc=pem5101m13m&utm_campaign=20210326_TY.100609_lindsey-graham_t1054152-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210326_c-r-i-s-i-s-at-the-border)

**Sadly, President Biden seems to have one guiding principle on immigration: undo everything President Trump accomplished.** From ending the construction of the border wall to ending the "Remain in Mexico" policy for asylum seekers, President Biden has overturned numerous SUCCESSFUL immigration policies of the Trump Administration that WORKED.

Democrats' open border policies have created national security and humanitarian crises. It is shameful, and it must stop now before it gets even worse.

[**DEMAND that Joe Biden reverse his failed immigration policies.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/lindsey-graham-p/?sc=pem5101m13m&utm_campaign=20210326_TY.100609_lindsey-graham_t1054152-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210326_c-r-i-s-i-s-at-the-border)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

**[**PITCH IN NOW**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/lindsey-graham-p/?sc=pem5101m13m&utm_campaign=20210326_TY.100609_lindsey-graham_t1054152-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210326_c-r-i-s-i-s-at-the-border)**
